query:
UPDATE resource_group rg
            SET modification_date_time = now(),
                resource_group_name = $2,
                attributes = $3,
                targets = $4
            WHERE rg.id = $1
            RETURNING
                rg.id,
                rg.created_date_time,
                rg.modification_date_time,
                rg.resource_group_name,
                rg.attributes,
                rg.targets as "targets:Vec<Target>"
